new_classes.definition_en: Spirit distilled from fruit (other than plums, pears or cherries covered by CN 2208 90 33/38, and other than the spirits covered by CN 2208 90 48), including calvados (apple brandy from Normandy), classified under CN subheading 2208 90 71 (Chapter 22).

Process of fermenting and distilling apples (or a mixture of apples and pears) to produce calvados or other apple-based fruit spirits; a specialisation of fruit fermentation and distillation used to classify CN 2208 90 71.

coverage_explanation: The core distinguishing criteria are captured: (1) the spirit is distilled from fruit (linked via hasFruitDistillationProcess to OtherFruitFermentationDistillation); (2) calvados is explicitly included as a named subtype (CalvadosFruitDistillation process class); (3) the CN code 22089071 is anchored via a hasValue restriction on codeString; (4) disjointness from PrunePearCherryBrandy (2208 90 33/38) and OtherFruitSpirit (2208 90 48) is expressed. Coverage is not 1.0 because the cross-reference to subheading 2208 90 48 explanatory note content is not reproduced here (it is covered under that sibling node), and the container-volume split present at some sibling codes is not applicable at this level per the legal text.
